lootr.message.cannot_break: Lootr blocks and entities cannot be broken or destroyed.
lootr.message.cannot_break_sneak: While in creative mode, you must sneak to break or destroy Lootr blocks and entities.
lootr.message.cart_should_sneak: Destroying this entity will prevent others from obtaining loot! Only destroy if really needed.
lootr.message.cart_should_sneak2: To destroy this entity anyway, sneak while attacking.
lootr.message.decay_in: 這個容器將在 %s 秒內完全腐朽。
lootr.message.decay_start: 容器在你觸碰時開始碎裂！它將在 %s 秒內完全腐朽。
lootr.message.decayed: 腐朽的容器在你觸碰時碎裂了！
lootr.message.invalid_table: Error with mod [%s], not Lootr! The loot table for this container [%s] does not exist or could not be loaded. Please report this to the mod author, not to Lootr.
lootr.message.refresh_in: 這個容器將在 %s 秒內重新整理其內容。
lootr.message.refresh_start: 容器將在 %s 秒內重新整理並出現新內容！
lootr.message.refreshed: 容器內的物品在你觸碰時重新整理了！
lootr.message.should_sneak: Breaking this block will prevent others from obtaining loot! Only break if really needed.
lootr.message.should_sneak2: To break the block anyway, sneak while breaking.
